content.en:
Over time, these creatures of the sea became almost extinct.

But it's only extinct now, and after a while, the fragments of the Dark Sea will continue to breed more creatures of the Dark Sea.

There is only one way to completely eradicate the birth of creatures in the Dark Sea, and that is to destroy the fragments of the Dark Sea.

However.

With their strength, it is simply impossible to destroy the fragments of the Dark Sea.

Just as they couldn't destroy the True Dragon Realm Ruins in the Ten Thousand Dragons' territorial waters, they didn't even have the strength to fight against the Dark Sea Fragments and the rules of the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

As a result, they had to come again and again to clean up the debris of the Dark Sea.

......

After cleaning up these Dark Sea creatures, many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors began to collect resources, after all, for a long time, the Dark Sea Fragments have also been constantly breeding resources.

Even if some resources are consumed by the creatures of the Hidden Sea, some of them will still remain.

"There are really a lot of resources!"

Ye Tian casually searched for it, and found a lot of resources, many of which were of great help to the Heavenly Ancestor of the Fusion Realm.

However, there were too few resources that would be useful to the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Just as he was looking for resources, a terrifying aura erupted from somewhere in the Dark Sea Fragments, instantly filling the entire Dark Sea Fragments.

"This breath ......"

Ye Tian hurried over.

Soon, a Heavenly Ancestor rushed to the source of this aura.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian looked at a huge arm in front of him and was extremely shocked.

The arm is pitch-black and covered with oval scales, unknown of what kind of creature it is.

Originally, this arm was blocked by an enchantment, so many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors did not sense its existence.

At this time, Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor said, "I sensed that there was an enchantment here, so I broke it with my hand, and I found this arm. "

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor frowned: "It should be the enchantment arranged by that poisonous dragon, I suspect that the poisonous dragon can break through to the second blood transformation realm, it has something to do with this arm." "

"The aura of this arm is too terrifying, I can't even get close!" said a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor with emotion.

"What kind of realm is the owner of this arm, there is definitely more than a second blood transformation realm, or even more than a third blood transformation realm. "Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor said.

"If my guess is not wrong, the owner of this arm should have the strength of seven Blood Transformation Realms!" the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor calculated: "This arm has been out of the body for endless years, and even went through many dangers in the gap of the territorial sea boundary before finally falling into the Dark Sea Fragment. As you can imagine, most of its power has actually dissipated, and the only remaining aura of power is difficult for us to get close!"

Seven Blood Transformation Realms!!!

Many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were shocked, this was an unimaginable realm for them!

In the territorial waters of the Ten Thousand Dragons, the strength of the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor has reached the second blood transformation realm, and the other heavenly ancestors are still in the first blood transformation realm.

Of course, this is not to say that the strength of the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor is the strongest, there are still many Heavenly Ancestors who are stronger than the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor in the history of Wanlong's territorial waters, but in order to pursue a higher realm, they have penetrated deep into the territorial waters and have never returned.

It is possible that those Heavenly Ancestors have fallen, or they may have lost their way and cannot find the location of the Wanlong territorial waters.

"This arm can't seem to be taken away!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor tried, but couldn't shake this arm.

"Actually, we can't use this arm!" Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor said: "The reason why that poisonous dragon can use this arm to become a secondary blood transformation realm is because that poisonous dragon itself was conceived under the influence of this arm, so it can use this arm!"

The other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors nodded their heads in agreement.

At this time, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm said: "But if you don't take this arm away, under the influence of this arm, the fragment of the river will still give birth to a creature similar to the poisonous dragon next time, and it may even produce other changes." If a creature of the Third Blood Transformation Realm is born, we won't be able to defeat it!"

"I can only seal it temporarily, add a few more layers of seals to reduce the impact!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor proposed.

Immediately, many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors began to arrange sealing enchantments.

Airplanes!!!!

Layer after layer of seals were blessed all around, preventing the breath of the arm from leaking out.

These Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors have been here for a long time, and they don't know how many layers of seals they have blessed.

In the end, the seal can no longer be blessed, and adding it is a waste and will not be of any use.

"So be it!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

Immediately, many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors continued to search for resources.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had almost scraped the resources in the fragments of the Hidden Sea, and every Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor had gained a lot.

"It's time to leave!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor summoned all the Heavenly Ancestors to gather together, then left the Dark Sea Fragments, and then crossed the Void of the Territorial Sea Boundary to find the sixth node.

Click!

Node No. 6 was torn apart, and many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors returned.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian is back.

"It's a bit risky to clean up the debris of the dark sea this time, if it weren't for this operation, I wouldn't know that Wanlong's territorial waters are in danger all the time, and if you're not careful, the creatures in the cracks in the territorial waters will invade Wanlong's territorial waters. Only with strength can danger be avoided. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, he first tried to cultivate, and continued to integrate the immeasurable divine light into the heart, causing the heart to slowly transform, but unfortunately the effect was very poor.

Although several resources have been found in the fragments of the Dark Sea, which help the heart metamorphosis, the number is too small and the effect is average, so there is no change.

I have to say that it is too difficult for the Boundary-Breaking Heavenly Ancestor to complete a blood transformation.

this day.

Ye Tian finally made a decision, that is, to break through the territorial sea boundary alone.

He doesn't have a boundary bead, once he enters the boundary gap of the territorial waters, he will definitely be washed away, but he doesn't care about this, after all, he just sent the copy body in, even if he is washed away and can't find a route back, it doesn't matter what.

Node Six.

Ye Tian came here, and immediately tore this node and entered the boundary gap of territorial waters.

At this moment, no one knew that a boundary-breaking Heavenly Ancestor had entered the boundary crack of the territorial waters.

Territorial sea boundary seam.

As soon as Ye Tian entered here, a huge impact instantly swept him away, gradually moving away from the No. 6 node, until he couldn't sense the location of the No. 6 node at all.

He did not resist, and followed the shock current of the rift in the territorial waters.

In this way, the years passed, and I don't know how many years passed.

He constantly tries to use the shock flow to change direction, otherwise he will never get rid of the shock flow.

After countless attempts, he finally mastered a little bit of regularity and mystery, and could shuttle and move in a small area in the shock current.
